reviews.comment: I wish I could give more stars! They were early, ready, courteous, felt such southern hospitality, friendly, and got the job done. I reserved the evening before and after getting 8 No's from other companies due to being full, you guys were my first Yes! So happy to know your work now.

reviews.comment: I recently moved from Ft. Lauderdale to Orlando. I have had bad experiences with past movers. A friend referred me to Rapid Panda Movers as he had just used their services as well. Andy and his team are great! They are professional and very efficient. Andy always answered his phone and answered any questions or concerns I had. I totally recommend them and will use them again for any future moves. I can now say, I have had a great experience with my move!

reviewReply.comment: Really appreciate your review Diana Davis. Very grateful for the feedback and sincerely wish you all the best.

reviews.name: accounts/113490489123284632438/locations/2655804103012623261/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURPbk56c3NBRRAB

reviews.comment:
BEWARE!! WOULD NOT RECOMMEN!
Horrible experience. The movers arrived almost one hour late. The guys were nice but slower than molasses knowing they are charging by the hour. The hourly fee stated it included wrapping furniture; they only wrapped 25% of the furniture because they were moving too slow hence many pieces of furniture were scratched as well as mirrors. My friend had to jump in to assist with the entire move otherwise it would have taken these guys 12 hours versus the estimated time of 7-8 hours. Owner was non chalant about the movers being late and overall feedback and if he could careless.

reviewReply.comment: Sorry for the bad experience Lisa Gomez. Please give us a call or email so we can ensure you are properly taken care of, because your business and satisfaction is important to us.

reviews.name: accounts/113490489123284632438/locations/2655804103012623261/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURPdE1YMER3EAE

reviews.comment: I recently moved from Chicago to S. Florida. I saw the add for Rapid Panda movers and read some of the reviews. The feedback made me feel comfortable enough to reserve their services. When I got to S. Florida I had issues with the moving company who was transporting my items from Chicago. This caused my move-in to be delayed by a week. Rapid Panda movers was very accommodating and quick to communicate back and forth as well as reschedule a few times while I was figuring out a new arrival date of my things. The day of the move-in Andy and team arrived on time as promised and knocked out the unloading of the truck quickly. The team was professional and handled my items with care. I will definitely be using them for future moves. I highly recommend them.

reviewReply.comment: Thanks for trusting us and your great review, you were a great customer to work with. Thanks for your kindness to our movers.

reviews.name: accounts/113490489123284632438/locations/2655804103012623261/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNPOXJTTUVBEAE

reviews.comment: Rapid panda movers are amazing!! The best and most efficient moving service I have ever used. They were responsive, professional, and moved all my furniture incredibly fast, safe and sound. I accidentally dropped my sunglasses and broke them and one of the movers even fixed them for me. Seriously the best service, I highly recommend these guys!

reviewReply.comment: Thank you very much for choosing us. We strive for best service every time and we are glad you got exactly that. Have a great day.

reviews.comment: Man let me tell you, I needed a move the SAME DAY, asap, I hit Andy up and his crew came in clutch. Within 2 hours he pulled up and moved EVERYTHING 5 hours north with a smile! The price beat every competitor. Very quick and professional, definitely go with these guys it’s the best you can get. Thank you team 👍

reviewReply.comment: We totally appreciate your review and your business. Thanks for trusting The Panda.

reviews.comment: They were so great to work with! From the initial call where he was so reassuring to the arrival and prompt service. I was already overwhelmed with such a rigorous move but they made me feel very comfortable with booking their services. I highly recommend this company. They took care with my belongings and was considerate on where and how to place them. Not to mention this move was on the third floor in blistering temps. You won’t go wrong with this company!

reviewReply.comment: We thank you for choosing us over so many option and also thank you for being so nice to our movers today.
